description_long: This object is a small bunch of bananas, consisting of three individual bananas still attached at the stem. The bananas have a smooth, slightly glossy yellow-green peel with a few minor brownish blemishes and faint surface marks. Two of the bananas display commercial stickers, one with a recognizable Dole logo and another with a green label, indicating they are store-bought. The bananas are gently curved, with the tips and stems visible, and the peels appear intact with no significant tears or splits. The surface texture is consistent with a typical banana, showing a semi-soft, slightly waxy finish. The overall appearance suggests the bananas are in good condition, with no visible signs of spoilage or external damage.
description: A small bunch of three yellow-green bananas with minor blemishes and two commercial stickers, featuring smooth, intact peels and gentle curvature.
description_view_0: Side view showing the length and curvature of the bananas, with the peels' smooth texture and minor blemishes visible.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the tips and the gentle arc of the bananas, with the stems partially visible.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the commercial stickers on two bananas and the attached stem, with the peels' surface details clearly seen.
description_view_3: Top-down view focusing on the tips and the overall arrangement of the bunch, with the peels' intact condition evident.
attribute_peel_condition: The banana peels are intact with a smooth surface, showing only minor blemishes and faint marks. There are no visible tears, splits, or significant bruising.
